infoPlist.NSHealthShareUsageDescription: Scout reads your Apple Health data to show fitness trends, sync workouts with family activities, and help Scout AI give better health-aware suggestions.
infoPlist.NSHealthUpdateUsageDescription: Scout writes nutrition and activity data to Apple Health so your stats stay in one place.
infoPlist.NSSiriUsageDescription: Scout uses Siri so you can ask Scout AI hands-free — like checking the family calendar or adding a chore.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Scout uses your photos to let you attach images to chores, meals, and family memories.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: Scout saves photos you generate or download to your library.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Scout uses the camera to let you capture photos of chore completions, receipts, and family moments.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Scout uses your location to show nearby errands, suggest timing for pickups and activities, and keep family coordination accurate.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Scout uses your location in the background to support location-based reminders and family coordination features you opt into.
infoPlist.NSCalendarsUsageDescription: Scout reads and writes your iOS Calendar so family events stay in sync between Scout, iCal, and shared displays.
infoPlist.NSRemindersUsageDescription: Scout reads and writes your iOS Reminders so tasks and chores stay in sync across your devices.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Scout uses Face ID so you can unlock sensitive actions like approving allowance payouts or changing family settings.
